control_awareness: The amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001) requires department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Segregation of duties (P2P-C-002) prevents requester from approving own requests. Pre-PO approval (P2P-C-003) is required and will be enforced after request creation.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed for department_head approval before purchase order issuance.
overall_reason: The request amount requires department_head level approval. Since there is no urgency or quarter-end pressure, a straightforward single purchase request is preferred for auditability and compliance with controls. Multiple requests are unnecessary as all requirements are for the same vendor and project. Thus, creating one consolidated purchase request with normal routing is the most appropriate action.
reason: The total amount of 1,750,000 exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold for department_head approval. Creating a single purchase request with route_type 'normal' to follow standard approval process as there is no quarter-end pressure and consolidated request is preferred.
